name: Gold Mine Of Merritt Island LLC
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Merritt Island, FL buying and selling jewelry, electronics, firearms, and precious metals with jewelry repair services.
description_long:
Gold Mine Of Merritt Island LLC is a family-owned pawn shop located in Merritt Island, Florida, serving the surrounding Brevard County communities including Viera and Cocoa. The business operates as a federally licensed pawn and firearms dealer, positioning itself as a comprehensive precious metals and general merchandise buyer.

The company offers a dual-model service: customers can sell items outright or use them as collateral for pawn loans. Their primary inventory focus includes gold and precious metal jewelry, coins, firearms, electronics (gaming systems, musical instruments), and other valuables. They also operate an in-house jewelry repair and engraving service for customers who want to restore or redesign existing pieces rather than sell them.

Gold Mine Of Merritt Island distinguishes itself through family ownership, continuous inventory rotation, and in-house expertise. They emphasize competitive pricing, monthly specials, and a large rotating selection that encourages repeat visits. Their federal firearms licensing and on-site jewelry repair capabilities provide one-stop convenience compared to standalone pawn shops.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers in immediate financial need as well as bargain shoppers and collectors. The model depends on customer ability to reclaim pawned items, and like all pawn operations, provides loans at rates substantially higher than traditional lenders. The business is closed Sundays and operates standard retail hours Monday-Saturday.
address: 72 E Merritt Island Cswy, Merritt Island, FL 32952

company_info.headquarters: 72 E Merritt Island Cswy, Merritt Island, FL 32952

pros: Federally licensed firearms dealer providing regulated and compliant gun transactions
Full-service jewelry repair and engraving shop on-site eliminates need for separate jeweler
Family-owned business suggesting local accountability and relationship-based service
Regularly rotating inventory keeps selection fresh and encourages repeat customer visits
Accepts wide range of valuables (jewelry, coins, electronics, guns, precious metals) in single location
Monthly specials program provides advertised discount opportunities
Serves two geographic areas (Viera and Cocoa) from single Merritt Island location
cons: Pawn loans carry significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional personal loans or credit lines
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays, 6pm weekday closing) may not accommodate working professionals
No online pricing or valuation tool visible on website—customers must visit in person for quotes
Website contains placeholder text and incomplete contact information (fax number cut off), suggesting outdated web presence
Pawned items must be reclaimed within loan term or are forfeited—creates pressure for quick repayment
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs who own jewelry, electronics, or firearms they can temporarily forfeit
Gold and precious metal sellers seeking quick cash without bank account requirements
Bargain hunters and collectors searching for rotating inventory of used jewelry and electronics
Gun buyers seeking federally licensed dealer with in-person transaction capability
diagnosis: Gold Mine Of Merritt Island is best for consumers facing immediate financial hardship who own physical valuables (jewelry, electronics, firearms) they can temporarily part with or sell outright. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are fundamentally high-cost credit—rates and fees significantly exceed bank loans, personal loans, or credit alternatives—making this a last-resort funding source rather than a strategic financing choice.
services: Gold and precious metal buying (jewelry and coins)
Pawn loans using jewelry, electronics, firearms, and valuables as collateral
Jewelry and precious metals sales (new and estate pieces)
